channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Number One on the Kill List: Did That Prompt Trump to Skip New $400M Air Force One for NATO Departure?
Watch: Even a Media Ally Refused to Accept This Claim from Abdul El-Sayed
Hidden Cost Quietly Adds Nearly $132K to New Home Prices, Study Reveals
item.description: Government regulations add nearly $132,000 to a new home's price, up 40% since 2021, according to a new NAHB study on the housing affordability crisis.

item.title: Platner Drops Out of Key Senate Race After Rape Allegation Derails Campaign
item.description: Graham Platner suspended his Maine Senate campaign amid controversies including Reddit posts, a controversial tattoo and allegations from an ex-girlfriend.
